summary: A brilliant 1985 Grateful Dead performance captured in a recording that shines when EQ‑adjusted and played loud.
review: Reviewers hail this show as one of the greatest experiences of 1985, urging listeners to set the EQ right and crank up the volume for full impact. The recording delivers strong energy and musicality, with only minor hints that proper equalization is needed to bring out its best sound.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 5‑star review praises the performance highly and notes only a modest EQ tweak, indicating an excellent show with good recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear enough for enjoyment but benefits from proper EQ adjustment and higher playback volume; no major flaws reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Described as a brilliant, high‑energy 1985 show that delivers an outstanding overall experience.
